mapper.insert: insert into announce ( announce_title, link, author, exc_insttNm, description, lcategory, pub_date, reqst_start_date, reqst_end_date, taget_name, view_num, file_path_name, file_name, how_to_register, call_company ,print_file_name , print_file_path_name) values ( #{announceTitle}, #{link}, #{author}, #{excInsttNm}, #{description}, #{lcategory}, #{pubDate}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{targetName}, #{viewNum}, #{filePathName}, #{fileName}, #{howToRegister}, #{callCompany} ,#{printFileName} ,#{printFilePathName} )
mapper.select: select announce_id, announce_title, exc_insttNm, reqst_start_date, reqst_end_date from announce

select announce_title, link, author, exc_insttNm, description, lcategory, pub_date, reqst_start_date, reqst_end_date, taget_name, view_num, file_path_name, file_name, how_to_register, call_company ,print_file_name , print_file_path_name from announce where announce_id=#{announceId}
